% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for per_user_mean_sinr_boxplot
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={Per-user mean SINR [dB]},
    ylabel={Deployment Strategy},
    grid=major,
    ytick={1,2,3,4,5},
    yticklabels={{\ifShowStrategyOne\strategy1[short]\fi},{\ifShowStrategyTwo\strategy2[short]\fi},{\ifShowStrategyThree\strategy3[short]\fi},{\ifShowStrategyFour\strategy4[short]\fi},{\ifShowStrategyFive\strategy5[short]\fi}},
    xmin=0,
  ]
    \ifShowStrategyOne
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw direction=x, boxplot/draw position=1, draw=CentralMassiveMimoColor, fill=CentralMassiveMimoColor!35] table[x=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyTwo
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw direction=x, boxplot/draw position=2, draw=DistributedFixedColor, fill=DistributedFixedColor!35] table[x=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyThree
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw direction=x, boxplot/draw position=3, draw=DistributedMovableColor, fill=DistributedMovableColor!35] table[x=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable.csv};
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFour
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw direction=x, boxplot/draw position=4, draw=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, fill=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor!35] table[x=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFive
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw direction=x, boxplot/draw position=5, draw=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, fill=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor!35] table[x=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \fi
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
